state.text: Governance Atlas BY ENTRADA GOVERN Command Center Discover Stewardship KNOWLEDGE Glossary & CDEs Lineage Atlas TRUST Audit Evidence Control Center S Skyler Admin Workspace › datapact.atlas ⌘K UC connected · 0% coverage Atlas AI WORKSPACE-SCOPED METADATA Workspace-scoped app-principal view; actor-scoped protected reads stay restricted. GLOSSARY & CDE REGISTRY Shared business meaning, anchored to data Glossary terms link to source-of-record assets. Critical Data Elements have stricter ownership, certification, and lineage requirements. + New term Loading glossary registry... Glossary 0 CDE Registry 0 Showing 0 of 0 CDE registry rows CDE SOURCE-OF-RECORD COLUMN OWNER RECERT STATUS CDE evidence unavailable Source column unavailable Owner unavailable Unavailable Unavailable CDE evidence unavailable Source column unavailable Owner unavailable Unavailable Unavailable CDE evidence unavailable Source column unavailable Owner unavailable Unavailable Unavailable CDE evidence unavailable Source column unavailable Owner unavailable Unavailable Unavailable CDE evidence unavailable Source column unavailable Owner unavailable Unavailable Unavailable Status and recertification are registry metadata values. Quality test-run or recertification workflow proof appears only when backed evidence is returned. Atlas AI Grounded in Databricks Genie evidence - no raw rows read x Ask about glossary terms, CDEs, reviewers, version history, and asset associations using governed metadata. I never read raw row values. TRY ASKING ? Which CDEs are due for review? → ? What assets are linked to the selected g
